title: Easiest way to see a list of items with a certain label?

posts.author: ScottStephan (Scott Stephan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi y’all,

We plan our sprints by assigning a label to an item. What we’re looking to do now is to just see a list of Items with that label.

It seems like the Search is the best way to do that, but is there a widget or something else I could pin to a dashboard? I’d love for my team to easily see “All Items assigned to me with this label”

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
ScottStephan:

It seems like the Search is the best way to do that, but is there a widget or something else I could pin to a dashboard? I’d love for my team to easily see “All Items assigned to me with this label”

Hi @ScottStephan, good question! Have you thought about using the table widget on the dashboard? You could make one for each team member, and filter by the team member and the label

posts.author: ScottStephan (Scott Stephan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Talia,

That’s perfect- Don’t know how I missed it!
